title: Button type column in sub-elements
excerpt:
Description
Do you plan to enable button type columns in the sub-item columns ? 
This would allow, for example, the activation of different automations for each sub-element of a main element. 
I think it’s a great idea …

posts.author: Serge (Rebuffat)
